title: Systemic practice pilot trial
body: "The Supporting Families programme commissioned a trial of systemic practice in early help services in children’s social care. Systemic practice is based on systemic family therapy. This is a long-established approach for psychologists and psychotherapists who work with families.  This research protocol document explains the trial design, outcome measures, and implementation approach, including:   training reflective practice systemic tools   The protocols are intended for researchers, policy makers, and practitioners involved in children’s social care family support and early help services. They help to provide a clear framework for assessing feasibility and indicative impact before a potential full-scale trial. "
